title: Accelerating happy ghasts
description: Makes happy ghast incrementally faster as they move forward
body:
Max speed is now around 20 blocks per second, and will be reached in a slow pace, starting slow and incrementally speeding up ONLY when going forward.

If the player stops pressing forward or press backwards, it will loose max speed quickly (faster if you press back).

This makes happy ghasts suitable for long distance travels, without sacrificing the precision for vertical building.
